_comment_for_translators: Engine-level UI chrome. Per-language strings live in src/languages/<code>/locales/.
test_helper: Try translating, then click to reveal.
onboarding_step1_title: You already understand more than you think.
onboarding_step1_body: Five minutes from now, you will have spoken a real sentence aloud — in the past, present, or future, your choice.
onboarding_step1_aside: No grammar lecture. No vocabulary list. Just the structural skeleton — three tenses, three forms, any verb. Master that and you can already say almost anything.
onboarding_step2_subtitle: This is a Romance language, full of words nearly identical to English. You just stole twenty-four of them, free.
onboarding_step3_title: One verb. Three tenses. Already a system.
onboarding_step3_aside: Notice the pattern. The structure stays the same — only the markers change.
onboarding_step4_prompt: How would you say "{{en}}" — present tense, first person?
onboarding_step5_title: You just generated a real sentence.
onboarding_step5_body: Three tenses. Three forms. Six subjects. Any verb.
onboarding_step5_aside: The textbook ahead of you teaches the system. Lesson 1 — The Matrix — is the place to look first. Five minutes a day for thirty days. By Day 30 you can ask, state, or deny anything in past, present, or future.
landing_hero_subtitle: Three years on Duolingo and you still freeze when the waiter asks what you want. The problem isn't you — it's the method. This is the one that ends in a real conversation.
landing_hero_demo_body: Three tenses × three forms = nine sentence types. Pick any verb, populate the grid, and you can already say almost anything.
landing_problem_quote: You can spend three years on language apps and still freeze the moment a real conversation starts. The problem isn't your effort — it's the method.
landing_problem_attribution: What most apps won't tell you
landing_method_1_body: Three tenses (future, present, past) crossed with three forms (question, affirmative, negative) gives you nine sentence types. Master the grid and you can generate thousands of sentences from any verb — without memorising a single conjugation table.
landing_method_2_body: Ninety percent of daily speech runs on the same small set of high-frequency verbs. Drill each one through the matrix until the structure fires automatically — like knowing seven times eight equals fifty-six without thinking.
landing_method_3_title: Five minutes, five times a day — for thirty-two days.
landing_method_3_body: Short bursts wire the brain more effectively than marathon sessions. The 32-day pacing schedule fits into ordinary life — between meetings, on the train, while coffee brews. By day thirty-two, the foundation is fireproof.
landing_timeline_title: A foundation strong enough that even months away, it never fully disappears.
landing_timeline_caption: Each milestone is a real, measurable shift. By day thirty-two, you ask, state, or deny anything — past, present, or future — without thinking about it.
landing_timeline_milestone_4: A real conversation — without thinking about grammar.
landing_includes_title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
landing_includes_matrix_desc: Any verb, all nine cells, click to hear. The core engine the rest of the course feeds into.
landing_includes_verbs_desc: Full conjugations across future, present, past, and beyond. The verbs that actually appear in real speech.
landing_includes_vocab_desc: Organised by context — family, food, travel, work — and embedded in real sentences. Audio on every word.
landing_includes_dialogues_desc: Café, taxi, restaurant, doctor, hotel, phone call. The exchanges you'll actually have, read aloud.
landing_includes_audio_desc: Studio-quality pronunciation on every word and phrase. Adjustable playback speed for shadowing practice.
landing_includes_plan_desc: Daily micro-practice schedule — five minutes, five times a day. Designed to fit ordinary life.
landing_languages_subtitle: Each course is a complete guide — from zero to confident conversation. Try the free lessons first, then unlock the full course with a one-time payment.
landing_bundle_title: All Access — every language, one price.
landing_bundle_body: Get every current course plus all future languages as they launch. One payment, lifetime access, all updates included.
landing_guarantee_body: Use the course for thirty days. If you cannot hold a 60-second conversation in your target language by the end of it, email me. I refund every cent. No forms. No "tell us why." One email.
landing_speak_subtitle: Don't just read it — say the sounds. You'll be surprised what your mouth already knows.
landing_speak_followup: That's it. That's the whole secret. Now imagine doing this for ninety-nine more sentences, ordered into a system. That's the course.
landing_loss_title: Most people who decide to learn a new language never do.
landing_loss_body: They download an app. They learn "hello" and "thank you." They lose the streak after eight days. Three years later, they still freeze when the waiter asks what they want. This is the part where you decide if you want to be one of them.
landing_testimonials_title: Built for people who've tried everything else.
landing_testimonials_disclaimer: Quotes published with permission. Replace placeholder testimonials with real ones before launch.
landing_testimonial_1_quote: I'd been on Duolingo for fourteen months and couldn't order a coffee. Five sessions of the matrix and I caught myself thinking in Romanian present tense. The structure clicks in a way nothing else has.
landing_testimonial_2_quote: The 32-day plan worked. Day 33 I was in Cluj asking strangers for directions. They corrected my accent and didn't switch to English. That has never happened to me with any other method.
landing_testimonial_3_quote: I'm a linguist. I bought this expecting to be unimpressed. The matrix is a genuinely original pedagogical move — it lets you generate language instead of memorising it. I now recommend it to my students.
landing_faq_1_a: An interactive web-based textbook: 17 structured lessons, 32 core verbs with full conjugations, 500+ vocabulary words with audio, 16 real-life dialogues, and a 32-day study plan. You access it in any browser — no app to install, no account chase, no subscription.
landing_faq_2_q: How is this different from Duolingo or Babbel?
landing_faq_2_a: Those apps teach you words. This teaches you the system — the structural skeleton underneath the language. The verb matrix method lets you generate thousands of sentences from day one, not just repeat phrases. It's also a one-time purchase. You own it. No streaks, no hearts, no manipulation.
landing_faq_3_q: Do I need to know anything before starting?
landing_faq_3_a: Nothing. The course begins from absolute zero. Lesson zero addresses the real reason languages don't stick — fear — and by lesson four you're already speaking out loud.
landing_faq_4_q: Is this really a one-time payment?
landing_faq_4_a: Yes. Pay once. Access the course forever, including every future update. No monthly charges, no auto-renewals, no surprises.
landing_faq_5_q: Can I try before I buy?
landing_faq_5_a: Absolutely. The interactive matrix, the 5-minute onboarding, and the foundational lessons are entirely free. You experience the method before deciding. Most people know within five minutes whether it's for them.
landing_final_cta_subtitle: Five minutes from now, your first sentence aloud. Thirty-two days from now, your first real conversation.
paywall_body: You've experienced the matrix method. The full course takes you from these foundations to confident conversation — seventeen lessons, thirty-two verbs, five hundred words, sixteen dialogues, and a complete study plan.
paywall_guarantee: 30-day money-back guarantee. One-time payment. Yours forever.
key_modal_subtitle_all: Enter your All Access license key.
key_modal_help: Lost your key? Check your purchase confirmation email, or contact {{email}}.
key_error_format: That doesn't look like a valid license key.
cinematic_2_sub: three tenses × three forms — nine cells
cinematic_3_sub: thirty-two verbs cover ninety percent of daily speech
cinematic_4_sub: five hundred essential — already in real sentences
landing_method_headline: Learn the system, not the vocabulary.
lesson_stop_here_body: You've reached the end of this phase. Come back tomorrow with this fresh.
focus_mode_hint_shortcut: Press F to toggle. Hides everything except the current lesson.
phase_foundations_intro: Sounds, sentences, the seven principles. Everything that follows assumes these.
phase_verbs_intro: Three tenses, three forms, nine cells. The matrix is the textbook in miniature.
phase_grammar_intro: Articles, agreement, possession. The skeleton beneath every sentence.
phase_tenses_intro: Past, future, conditional. The shapes a sentence takes through time.
phase_reference_intro: Vocabulary, dialogues, the thirty-two-day plan. The textbook becomes a reference book.
key_error_remote_invalid: This key isn't valid. Check the email you received after purchase.
key_error_wrong_product: This key is for a different course. Try a different language tab.
key_error_network: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
picker_subtitle: You can change this anytime in settings.
